DISCOVERY 301, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PETER LAMBERTSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED (1) TO PROVIDE VERIFICATIONS TO HIS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES, (2) TO INCLUDE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO WHICH HE HAS ACCESS AS A CORPORATE OFFICER IN RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION 1, AND (3) TO PAY DEFENDANT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 BY MARCH 15, 2011 ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED
